title: ilex cassine
intro: Ilex cassine, also known as the dahoon holly or black holly, is a species of flowering plant in the family Aquifoliaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Ilex cassine include its ability to support cardiovascular health, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Ilex cassine can be prepared in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
